summary: Iteration 7 minimal scope: verified the two backend SSE requests requested. Both PASSED in 15.75s total (sequential, -n 0). (1) Ensemble multi-mode POST /api/chat/stream with use_multi=true completed in 10.5s with done event: model=gpt-oss:20b, role='ensemble', ensemble={drafter:'qwen3-coder-next', critic:'gemma3:12b', verifier:'ministral-3:8b', finalizer:'gpt-oss:20b'} - 4 distinct real models. Stages appeared in the required order classify(0.16s)->draft(0.16s)->critique(1.6s)->factcheck(6.4s)->finalize(8.4s). Content 191 chars, non-empty. done.model==ensemble.finalizer. (2) Single-mode regression with use_multi=false, message='hi' completed in 5.2s with done event: model=gemma3:12b, role=fast, ensemble=None, content 150 chars. Matches the manually-verified iteration-6 shape exactly.
critical_code_review_comments: harness/pipeline.py: ensemble branch emits stages in the exact required order (classify->draft->critique->factcheck->finalize) and populates done.ensemble with all four role keys plus role='ensemble'. Clean.
harness/config.py pick_ensemble: correctly returns four distinct models (drafter, critic, verifier, finalizer) with sensible defaults; the run produced 4 distinct real models on the first try.
server.py SendMessage.use_multi flag wires straight through to run_pipeline; done event carries ensemble metadata as spec'd.
seed_data_creation: TEST_ens_<uuid> and TEST_single_<uuid> chat_ids created for the two SSE calls; no cleanup required (chat records auto-created on stream).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_ensemble.py -v -s --tb=short -n 0. Both tests are sequential and fast (~15s total when the Ollama key isn't throttled). The pytest.ini enables xdist by default; use '-n 0' or rely on LoadScopeScheduling (same file -> same worker) if you need serial semantics. Ensemble finalizer done event JSON path: events[-1].ensemble.{drafter,critic,verifier,finalizer} and events[-1].role=='ensemble'.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. Both required behaviours confirmed on the first attempt matching the manually-verified shape from iteration-6.
